elements.title: lang::report_page_025_title::local_kopere_bi
elements.commandsql:
SELECT kbi_gi.itemname                            AS activity_name,
       kbi_g.userid,
       kbi_u.username,
       kbi_u.firstname,
       kbi_u.lastname,
       kbi_c.fullname,
       kbi_cc1.name                               AS course_category,
       kbi_c.shortname,
       CONCAT(kbi_gu.firstname, ' ', kbi_gu.lastname) AS grader_name,
       kbi_g.timemodified                         AS graduated,
       ROUND((CASE
                WHEN kbi_g.rawgrademax > 0 THEN (kbi_g.finalgrade / kbi_g.rawgrademax) * 100
                ELSE kbi_g.finalgrade END), 0)    AS grade,
       ROUND((CASE
                WHEN (kbi_g.rawgrademax - kbi_g.rawgrademin) > 0
                        THEN ((kbi_g.finalgrade - kbi_g.rawgrademin) / (kbi_g.rawgrademax - kbi_g.rawgrademin)) * 100
                ELSE kbi_g.finalgrade END), 0)    AS grade_percent,
       kbi_gi.itemtype,
       kbi_sg.timemodified                        AS need_grade_assignment,
       kbi_ass.timemodified                       AS submission_date,
       kbi_ul.timeaccess                          AS course_lastaccess
FROM mdl_course kbi_c
       JOIN mdl_course_categories kbi_cc1 ON kbi_cc1.id = kbi_c.category
       JOIN mdl_modules kbi_m ON kbi_m.name = 'assign'
       JOIN mdl_course_modules kbi_cm ON kbi_cm.course = kbi_c.id AND kbi_cm.module = kbi_m.id
       JOIN (SELECT kbi_ctx.instanceid, kbi_ra.userid
             FROM mdl_context kbi_ctx
                    JOIN mdl_role_assignments kbi_ra ON kbi_ra.contextid = kbi_ctx.id AND kbi_ra.roleid = 5
             WHERE kbi_ctx.contextlevel = 50
             GROUP BY kbi_ctx.instanceid, kbi_ra.userid) ra ON kbi_ra.instanceid = kbi_c.id
       JOIN mdl_user kbi_u ON kbi_u.id = kbi_ra.userid
       JOIN mdl_grade_items kbi_gi ON kbi_gi.iteminstance = kbi_cm.instance AND kbi_gi.itemmodule = 'assign'
       LEFT JOIN mdl_grade_grades kbi_g ON kbi_gi.id = kbi_g.itemid AND kbi_g.userid = kbi_u.id
       LEFT JOIN mdl_assign_submission kbi_ass
         ON kbi_ass.userid = kbi_u.id AND kbi_ass.assignment = kbi_cm.instance AND kbi_ass.status = 'submitted' AND kbi_ass.latest = 1
       LEFT JOIN mdl_assign_grades kbi_sg
         ON kbi_ass.assignment = kbi_sg.assignment AND kbi_ass.userid = kbi_sg.userid AND kbi_sg.attemptnumber = kbi_ass.attemptnumber AND
            kbi_sg.grade > -1
       LEFT JOIN mdl_user kbi_gu ON kbi_gu.id = kbi_sg.grader
       LEFT JOIN mdl_user_lastaccess kbi_ul ON kbi_ul.courseid = kbi_c.id AND kbi_ul.userid = kbi_u.id
WHERE kbi_c.id > 0
  AND kbi_c.id = :courseid
  AND kbi_u.deleted = 0
  AND kbi_u.suspended = 0
  AND kbi_u.username != 'guest'
  AND kbi_c.visible = 1
